CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Sent to Visit Unit (Appointment), R" and send "Rental, Send to Visit via Appointment" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Sent to Visit Unit (Appointment), R" and send "Rental, Send to Visit via Appointment" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.label: Send Appointment Emails, R
